compressed_prompt: Write a rap about a new smartphone. At the end of your response add a postscript starting with P.P.S The response must contain at least 6 placeholders represented by square brackets.
response:
Yo, listen up, I got a story to tell
'Bout a new smartphone that's doing well
It's the [Brand Name] [Model Number], the latest in the game
With a [Screen Size] inch display, it's got the perfect frame
The camera's on point, with [Number] megapixels too
And a battery that lasts all day, with [Battery Capacity]mAh to get you through
It's powered by a [Processor Name] processor, fast and sleek
And with [Operating System] on board, it's got the features unique

I'm snapping pics and sending texts, with ease and with flair
The [Color] finish is fire, and it's beyond compare
I'm streaming videos and playing games, with no lag or delay
This phone's got the specs, to make your mobile life a breeze every day

P.P.S I'm hyped to get my hands on this new device, and I'm sure you'll be too when you see the [Release Date] launch date, so mark your calendars!
